# VALIDATION QUALITY METRICS DOCUMENTATION

## Study Information
- **Study ID:** Protocol CDISC01
- **Validation Date:** 2024-03-15
- **Validation Phase:** Final Database Lock
- **Validator:** Senior Clinical Statistical Programmer
- **Document Version:** 1.0

---

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

This document summarizes the quality metrics and validation pass rates for the clinical study database validation. The validation process assessed data quality, programming standards, log file integrity, and methodological compliance across all SDTM and ADaM datasets.

**Overall Validation Status:** PASSED with minor observations

---

## VALIDATION CHECK CATEGORIES

### D-xxx: Data Quality Checks
Checks focused on data integrity, completeness, consistency, and CDISC compliance.

### L-xxx: Log File Checks
Verification of program execution logs, error messages, warnings, and processing notes.

### P-xxx: Programming Standards Checks
Assessment of code quality, documentation, version control, and programming conventions.

### M-xxx: Methodology Checks
Validation of statistical methods, derivation algorithms, and analysis specifications.

---

## QUALITY METRICS SUMMARY

### Overall Pass Rates

| Category | Total Checks | Passed | Failed | Warning | Pass Rate |
|----------|--------------|--------|--------|---------|-----------|
| D-xxx (Data) | 156 | 152 | 2 | 2 | 97.4% |
| L-xxx (Log) | 48 | 47 | 0 | 1 | 97.9% |
| P-xxx (Programming) | 89 | 86 | 1 | 2 | 96.6% |
| M-xxx (Methodology) | 34 | 33 | 0 | 1 | 97.1% |
| **TOTAL** | **327** | **318** | **3** | **6** | **97.2%** |

---

## DETAILED FINDINGS BY CATEGORY

### D-xxx: DATA QUALITY CHECKS

#### D-001: SDTM Domain Completeness
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All required SDTM domains present (DM, AE, CM, EX, LB, VS, MH, DS)
- **Records Validated:** 15,847

#### D-002: Required Variables Present
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All required variables per SDTMIG v3.4 present in each domain

#### D-003: Data Type Consistency
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All variables conform to expected data types (Char/Num)

#### D-004: Controlled Terminology
- **Status:** WARNING
- **Result:** 2 non-standard terms identified in AE.AEDECOD
- **Impact:** Low - terms are valid MedDRA terms but not in sponsor CT list
- **Action:** Update controlled terminology library

#### D-005: Date/Time Completeness
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** 99.8% completeness for required date variables

#### D-006: Subject Traceability
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All subjects in analysis datasets traceable to SDTM.DM

#### D-007: Duplicate Records Check
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** No duplicate records identified based on key variables

#### D-008: Missing Data Patterns
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** Missing data within acceptable limits per protocol

#### D-009: Range Checks - Laboratory
- **Status:** FAILED
- **Result:** 3 out-of-range values in LB domain not flagged
- **Severity:** MEDIUM
- **Action Required:** Review and document clinical significance

#### D-010: Range Checks - Vital Signs
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All vital signs within protocol-defined ranges or appropriately flagged

#### D-011: ADaM Dataset Structure
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** ADSL, ADAE, ADLB, ADVS conform to ADaMIG v1.3

#### D-012: Analysis Flags Derivation
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All analysis flags (ANL01FL, ANL02FL) correctly derived

#### D-013: Baseline Derivation
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** Baseline values correctly identified per SAP

#### D-014: Treatment Variables
- **Status:** FAILED
- **Result:** TRT01P/TRT01A mismatch for 1 subject
- **Severity:** HIGH
- **Action Required:** Investigate and resolve discrepancy

#### D-015: Derived Variables Accuracy
- **Status:** WARNING
- **Result:** CHG calculation verified but 1 subject has missing baseline
- **Impact:** Low - subject excluded from change-from-baseline analyses

---

### L-xxx: LOG FILE CHECKS

#### L-001: Program Execution Status
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All programs executed successfully without errors

#### L-002: Error Messages
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** No ERROR messages in any log files

#### L-003: Warning Messages
- **Status:** WARNING
- **Result:** 12 WARNING messages identified - all reviewed and acceptable
- **Details:** Warnings related to uninitialized variables (intentional per design)

#### L-004: Notes Review
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All NOTES reviewed; no action items identified

#### L-005: Merge Statistics
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All merges completed with expected match rates (>99.5%)

#### L-006: Observation Counts
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** Observation counts consistent across related datasets

---

### P-xxx: PROGRAMMING STANDARDS CHECKS

#### P-001: Header Documentation
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All programs contain complete header blocks per standards

#### P-002: Code Comments
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** Adequate commenting throughout code (>15% comment ratio)

#### P-003: Variable Labels
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All variables properly labeled per CDISC standards

#### P-004: Format Assignments
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All variables have appropriate formats assigned

#### P-005: Macro Usage
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** Macros properly documented and validated

#### P-006: Hard-Coded Values
- **Status:** FAILED
- **Result:** 2 instances of hard-coded dates found in ad_adlb.sas
- **Severity:** MEDIUM
- **Action Required:** Replace with parameter-driven values

#### P-007: Program Validation Status
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All programs peer-reviewed and approved

#### P-008: Version Control
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All programs under version control with appropriate tags

#### P-009: Naming Conventions
- **Status:** WARNING
- **Result:** 3 temporary datasets do not follow naming convention
- **Impact:** Low - internal datasets only

#### P-010: Code Efficiency
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** No inefficient code patterns identified

---

### M-xxx: METHODOLOGY CHECKS

#### M-001: SAP Compliance
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All analyses implemented per Statistical Analysis Plan v2.0

#### M-002: Derivation Algorithms
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All derivation algorithms match specifications

#### M-003: Analysis Populations
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** Population flags correctly derived (ITT, PP, Safety)

#### M-004: Visit Windows
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** Visit windowing applied correctly per protocol

#### M-005: Imputation Methods
- **Status:** WARNING
- **Result:** LOCF imputation documented but not required per protocol amendment
- **Impact:** Low - analysis set retained for sensitivity analysis

#### M-006: Statistical Methods
- **Status:** PASSED
- **Result:** All statistical methods correctly implemented

---

## SEVERITY CLASSIFICATION

### HIGH Severity Issues (Immediate Action Required)
1. **D-014:** Treatment variable mismatch for 1 subject
   - **Impact:** Affects treatment assignment accuracy
   - **Resolution Target:** Within 24 hours
   - **Owner:** Data Management Team

### MEDIUM Severity Issues (Action Required Before Final)
1. **D-009:** Unidentified out-of-range laboratory values
   - **Impact:** Potential data quality concern
   - **Resolution Target:** Within 48 hours
   - **Owner:** Clinical Programming Team

2. **P-006:** Hard-coded date values in program
   - **Impact:** Reduces program reusability
   - **Resolution Target:** Before final submission
   - **Owner:** Programming Team

### LOW Severity Issues (Documentation/Enhancement)
1. **D-004:** Non-standard controlled terminology terms
2. **D-015:** Missing baseline for 1 subject
3. **L-003:** Acceptable warning messages
4. **P-009:** Temporary dataset naming convention
5. **M-005:** Unnecessary imputation method retained

---

## OUTSTANDING ISSUES TRACKING

| Issue ID | Category | Description | Severity | Status | Target Date | Owner |
|----------|----------|-------------|----------|--------|-------------|-------|
| ISS-001 | D-014 | Treatment variable mismatch | HIGH | OPEN | 2024-03-16 | DM Team |
| ISS-002 | D-009 | Out-of-range lab values | MEDIUM | OPEN | 2024-03-17 | CP Team |
| ISS-003 | P-006 | Hard-coded dates | MEDIUM | OPEN | 2024-03-20 | Prog Team |
| ISS-004 | D-004 | CT terminology update | LOW | OPEN | 2024-03-22 | DM Team |
| ISS-005 | P-009 | Naming convention | LOW | ACCEPTED | N/A | N/A |
| ISS-006 | M-005 | Document LOCF retention | LOW | OPEN | 2024-03-18 | Stats Team |

---

## VALIDATION CONCLUSION

The validation process has been completed with an overall pass rate of **97.2%**. The database quality is acceptable for regulatory submission pending resolution of:

- 1 HIGH severity issue (treatment variable mismatch)
- 2 MEDIUM severity issues (range checks and hard-coded values)

All critical data quality checks have passed. The identified issues do not impact the integrity of the primary efficacy or safety analyses. A re-validation will be performed after resolution of HIGH and MEDIUM severity issues.

---

## RECOMMENDATIONS

1. **Immediate Actions:**
   - Resolve treatment variable mismatch (ISS-001)
   - Investigate out-of-range laboratory values (ISS-002)

2. **Before Final Submission:**
   - Update programs to remove hard-coded values (ISS-003)
   - Update controlled terminology library (ISS-004)
   - Document retention of LOCF methodology (ISS-006)

3. **Process Improvements:**
   - Enhance automated range checking for laboratory data
   - Implement stricter code review for hard-coded values
   - Update programming standards for temporary dataset naming

---
